job.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
job.description: We are seeking a Full-Stack Web Developer to join our engineering team. The developer will build and maintain responsive web applications, develop REST APIs, integrate frontend and backend modules, and work with databases. The ideal candidate should have strong skills in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express.js, and Git. Familiarity with Docker and modern development workflows is a plus.

resume.scoringText: A motivated Computer Science graduate with hands-on experience in frontend and backend development. Strong skills in React, JavaScript, HTML, CSS. Basic experience with Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs. Familiar with Git & GitHub and Docker.

experience.title: Frontend Web Intern
experience.description: Developed UI components with React, HTML, CSS.

experience.title: Backend Trainee
experience.description: Built small Node.js and Express.js apps.
